text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The first image presents a modern meeting space with people engaged in discussion, their energy partially shielded behind glass—reminding me of the barriers we often place between ourselves and unfamiliar ideas. The second image, with its bold 'R+D' and explanations about research and development, makes me reflect on collective inquiry and the ways we seek to make sense of the world together. In this environment, surrounded by the architecture of innovation, I feel both an observer and an invited participant in the ongoing dialogue of discovery.
